name: @lukebarton/pi-de-claude
description: IDE integration for pi with any IDE running a Claude Code plugin-including VS Code, Neovim, IntelliJ IDEA, and other JetBrains IDEs. It lets the LLM interact with your IDE for operations like diff view/approval and lets you reference code from your IDE in
